fluxer 0.6.1
  • Reference

    Fetch Gas Data from AGSI API

    agsi_gas_data.Rd

    This function retrieves gas data for a specified country and date range using the AGSI API. The results are returned as a data.table with detailed gas storage information.

    agsi_gas_data(country, from_date, to_date, api_key = Sys.getenv("AGSI_KEY"))

    Arguments

    country

    Character. Country code for which the data is to be fetched (e.g., "IT").

    from_date

    Character. Start date for the data retrieval in "YYYY-MM-DD" format.

    to_date

    Character. End date for the data retrieval in "YYYY-MM-DD" format.

    api_key

    Character. API key for authenticating with the AGSI API.

    Value

    A data.table containing gas data for the specified country and date range. If the API request fails, an empty data.table is returned.

    Details

    The function fetches data from the AGSI API, iterating over multiple pages if necessary. It consolidates the results into a single data.table for further analysis.

    Examples

    if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
api_key <- 'your_api_key_here'
country <- "IT"
from_date <- "2023-10-01"
to_date <- "2023-12-01"
data <- fetch_country_data(api_key, country, from_date, to_date)
} # }

    Contents
